site.name: CMSBar Astro example
site.description: A site edited in place with CMSBar, running on Astro with editor-gated hydration.

home.title: CMSBar runs in this Astro host
home.description: A site edited in place with CMSBar, running on Astro with editor-gated hydration.

hero.headline: Click anything. Change it. Ship it as a PR.
hero.subtitle: This text is editable - log in at /cmsbar/login and click it.

demo.title: CMSBar runs in this Astro host
demo.intro: This paragraph and the heading above are rendered by the framework-neutral CMS primitives. Public visitors get this as static HTML with zero CMS JavaScript; when an editor session cookie is detected the same content region is shipped as a hydrated React island so editing works in place.
